sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73327" key="o(lo/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full-voiced,</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vox et praeterea nihil,</tr_> of the cock, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:259" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">259</biblScope> </bibl> (<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλόφωνος</orth> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with fatal voice,</tr_> cj. Meineke).</sense> </entryFree>
